untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'ATR from entry' for stop loss calculation (1.5x ATR), which requires dynamic position tracking. The allowed indicators include atr_7, atr_14, atr_20 but the signal requires ATR multiplier applied to entry price — this requires state management beyond static condition evaluation. Additionally, 'post_news_wait_hours' and 'time zone consideration' cannot be expressed with the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Translated 3 entry conditions: volume > 5-period MA, price > 10-period MA, and previous volume > 5-period MA (emerging demand). Exit uses price closing below 10-period MA. Stop loss specification (1.5x ATR) cannot be fully expressed without dynamic entry price reference. News timing conditions omitted due to lack of news event indicators. Direction set to LONG per signal intent. Target regimes mapped to TRENDING_UP and HIGH_VOL.
